message:
Running command: # DRT running at 634% CPU (8 threads), 62.6% memory (5GB RAM!)
# Steps created: 33 AND 34 (two DetailedRouting steps?)
# DRT progress: 100% with 83,662 violations - this is INITIAL pass violations.
# These violations will be reduced through iterative repair passes.
# 
# Step 33 was created (might be a new GRT pass) and step 34 is DRT.
# 83,662 violations after first pass - normal for a chip this size.
# 40 iterations to reduce them (DRT_OPT_ITERS=40).
#
# Let's monitor progress
sleep 1800
ps -p 531004 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "DRT ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
